title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast discusses how software engineering is evolving in the AI era, the surge in AI spending ("tokenmaxxing"), NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling large models on personal PCs, and the challenges universities face integrating AI literacy into curricula as graduates enter transformed workplaces.
